# services.rosenpass

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.rosenpass`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.rosenpass.defaultDevice` | `null or string` | Name of the network interface to use for all peers by default. |
| `services.rosenpass.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Rosenpass. |
| `services.rosenpass.package` | `package` | The rosenpass package to use. |
| `services.rosenpass.settings` | `open submodule of (TOML value)` | Configuration for Rosenpass, see <https://rosenpass.eu/> for further information. |
| `services.rosenpass.settings.listen` | `list of string` | List of local endpoints to listen for connections. |
| `services.rosenpass.settings.peers` | `list of (open submodule of (TOML value))` | List of peers to exchange keys with. |
| `services.rosenpass.settings.peers.*.device` | `string` | Name of the local WireGuard interface to use for this peer. |
| `services.rosenpass.settings.peers.*.endpoint` | `null or string` | Endpoint of the remote Rosenpass peer. |
| `services.rosenpass.settings.peers.*.peer` | `string` | WireGuard public key corresponding to the remote Rosenpass peer. |
| `services.rosenpass.settings.peers.*.public_key` | `absolute path` | Path to a file containing the public key of the remote Rosenpass peer. |
| `services.rosenpass.settings.public_key` | `absolute path` | Path to a file containing the public key of the local Rosenpass peer. Generate this by running {command}`rosenpass gen-keys`. |
| `services.rosenpass.settings.secret_key` | `absolute path` | Path to a file containing the secret key of the local Rosenpass peer. Generate this by running {command}`rosenpass gen-keys`. |
| `services.rosenpass.settings.verbosity` | `one of "Verbose", "Quiet"` | Verbosity of output produced by the service. |
